log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Lizardfolk — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Lizardfolk — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 18] HIT! 15 damage. Lizardfolk — Unarmored Caster HP: 52/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 18] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 18] HIT! 16 damage. Lizardfolk — Unarmored Caster HP: 36/67
--- Lizardfolk — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 36/67 | AC: 18
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Lizardfolk — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).

→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 18] MISS.

→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 18] HIT! 16 damage. Lizardfolk — Unarmored Caster HP: 20/67
--- Lizardfolk — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 20/67 | AC: 18
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
